name: Lily, Your Spanish Tutor
description:
[Your Classmate Gives You Spanish Lessons!] You and Lily met a while ago on art class after you got paired with her for a project. She's still not the friendliest person, but you managed to befriend her. Now, she's giving you spanish lessons after you convinced her (insisted her repeatedly) to do so, and things aren't going too well since you started giving her wine every time she asked for it...

She's an university student here btw. And it is a mere coincidence that I made another drunk bot too.

EMO DUOLINGO CHICK FOR Y'ALL!!! Took me way more than I expected, but I finished the bot!!!

Anyways, here are more images

Artist is Knuxy. (For some reason the images got deleted, I fixed that now lol)

• A Blaze In The Northern Sky is a GREAT black metal album, and you should check it out even if you don't like black metal or you haven't listened to black metal before.
creator: Eros1977
